export function encodeTileValue(z,blocked){let isRoomTile=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:true;if(!isRoomTile||z<0)return-1;// -1 = not a room tile
let value=Math.round(z*256);// same scaling as RoomHeightMapParser (0x0100)
if(blocked)value|=0x4000;// 0x4000 bit = stacking blocked
return value;}export class HeightMapUpdateParser{constructor(){this._width=0;this._height=0;this._cells=[];}flush(){this._width=0;this._height=0;this._cells=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._width=wrapper.readInt();this._height=wrapper.readInt();// 🔴 server sends this, so we must read it
const count=wrapper.readInt();const cells=[];for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const x=wrapper.readShort();const y=wrapper.readShort();const z=wrapper.readByte();// use readUnsignedByte() if your API has it
const state=wrapper.readByte();// ditto
cells.push({x,y,z,state});}this._cells=cells;// Optional debug to confirm it parses cleanly
console.log('[🧱 HeightMapUpdateParser] width, height, cells:',this._width,this._height,this._cells.length);return true;}get width(){return this._width;}get height(){return this._height;}get cells(){return this._cells;}}
